title: feat(core): pass through experimental_toToolResultContent for multi-modal tool results
summary: Community PR that adds passthrough support for AI SDK's `experimental_toToolResultContent` property on Mastra tools. This enables tools to return multi-modal content (images, text) as native content blocks in tool results. Changes span 3 files: adds the property to ToolAction interface and CoreTool/InternalCoreTool types, stores it in the Tool class constructor, and passes it through in CoreToolBuilder.build(). The pattern follows existing conventions (same approach as providerOptions and mcp passthrough).
maintainerNotes: Merge conflicts need resolution. No changeset included. CI checks are stuck in pending (likely due to external contributor — secrets-gated jobs didn't run). CodeRabbit review raised two valid points: (1) the property is not mapped to `toModelOutput` in buildV5() for AI SDK v5 compatibility, and (2) the inline return type is duplicated 4 times and should be extracted to a named alias. Author has pinged maintainers twice asking for review (Feb 28 and Mar 5). Claims they are running a patched version and wants to get off it. Despite PR description checking 'has tests', no actual test files were added or modified.
